title: Vanilla+ | Better Exploration
description: Vanilla+ is a modpack for Minecraft that enhances the game with diverse terrain generation, stunning biomes, custom structures, and various quality-of-life improvements, creating a more immersive and rewarding exploration experience.
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/256c4bce8b2dfc549c54c67a1a0b134a25b84edc.jpeg)

Dive into a reimagined Minecraft experience with Vanilla+! This modpack enhances your adventures by overhauling terrain generation for more diverse and immersive landscapes. Discover stunning biomes filled with unique flora and fauna, and explore meticulously crafted custom structures that enrich your world with lore and resources. Enjoy a range of quality-of-life improvements, improved navigation, and enhanced visual effects that make exploration more rewarding than ever. Whether you’re a builder, explorer, or survivalist, Terrain Revamp transforms your Minecraft journey into an unforgettable adventure!
